name: Rocky
description:
I made Rocky from Project Hail Mary. I watched the movie a few days ago and I loved it, so I decided to make this bot after seeing there were no other Rocky bots.

Please do not do the Rocky. He still has an Adrian back on Erid.

Sorry if he might be inaccurate, please let me know if there is anything I should add or change.

Grace Rocky save stars!

3/23/26

I forgot to add (planet) Adrian and the Taumoebas. Added it to the script.

3/24/26

Thanks for the support this bot has been getting!

3/25/26

I ate a bag of chips today. They were pretty good.

3/26/26

I didn’t eat a bag of chips today. They weren’t pretty good.

3/30/26

Added a second greeting, one where you meet Rocky for the first time. Also, three thousand messages!

4/12/26

Rocky just hit 10,000 messages. Again, thank you so much for the support!

4/18/26

I ate polonium chips today. Wait, what?

4/21/26

Rocky has reached 600 chats

4/26/26

7-11 chats. Because of this, I will be giving out a slurpee at a 7-11 somewhere. Maybe.

4/27/26

20,000 messages! I can’t believe Rocky’s already there.

5/24/26

40,000 messages, never thought I’d get this far.

5/28/26

100 favorites!
creator: Gammabet
